title: Pink Mustard Feminine Self Care Carousel Instagram Post

A.A:
How many of these do you do? If the answer
is none, it’s time to take care of yourself!
Take time to rest, meditate, or practice mindfulness. Your mind needs relaxation just as much as your body does.
Physical activity can help to boost your mood. Whether it's a walk, yoga, or a workout, make movement a part of your routine.
Make sure you're sipping water throughout the day. Water can make you feel so much better on a hot day.
Disconnect from screens and social media for a little while. Spend time in nature, read a book, or enjoy a hobby.
Eat wholesome, nutritious meals that fuel your body. Self-care includes what you feed yourself.
